# Graffiti+

> Graffiti+ is the original interactive digital graffiti wall — a hands-on, no-mess, no-fumes graffiti experience for event activations, brand events, music festivals, sports activations, augmented reality events, and corporate experiences. Built from the culture in Vancouver in 2008, with 500+ activations on 6 continents.

Graffiti+ is operated by Tangible Interaction Design Inc. The platform uses custom-branded spray-can controllers with real spray-can physics (pressure, cap size, distance, drips) paired with an LED wall, LCD display, or projection mapping output. Multiple guests can paint simultaneously. Trained graffiti-artist technicians run every activation on-site. Artwork is shareable, printable, and can be extended into augmented reality.

Clients include Nike, Jordan, Samsung, Porsche, Google, Disney, Louis Vuitton, Chanel, Hennessy, IBM, Modelo, Williams Racing F1, Netflix, Hyundai, Dell, Mattel, Ford, Kia, and others.

Contact: info@graffitiplus.io · +1 (323) 991-6463

## Core pages

- [Home](https://graffitiplus.io/): Overview, how it works, configurations, FAQs, contact.
- [Rentals](https://graffitiplus.io/rentals): Three rental configurations — LED Wall (outdoor / large crowds), LCD Display (indoor / controlled environments), Projection (large-scale mapping, zero footprint). Fully staffed and branded.
- [Add-ons](https://graffitiplus.io/add-ons): Customization options — branded spray cans, custom stencils, augmented reality overlays, on-site printing, custom backgrounds, brand overlays.
- [Gallery](https://graffitiplus.io/gallery): 500+ activation case studies worldwide.
- [About](https://graffitiplus.io/about): The story of Graffiti+ — from writing graffiti in the 90s to building the world's most-deployed interactive digital graffiti wall.

Full gallery index: https://graffitiplus.io/gallery

## Common questions

- **Does it work outdoors?** Yes — the LED configuration is built for direct sunlight and large outdoor crowds. LCD and projection work best indoors.
- **Can multiple people paint at once?** Yes. LED supports many simultaneous painters (more with larger walls). LCD supports 1–2, projection supports 2–3.
- **Custom branding?** Yes — branded spray cans, custom stencils, brand overlays, custom backgrounds, on-site printing, AR extensions.
- **Staffing?** Every activation includes trained graffiti-artist technicians on-site for setup, operation, and takedown.
- **Lead time?** 4–6 weeks minimum for US events; longer for international or multi-city.
- **On-site requirements?** Standard 110V power and floor space. Setup takes 2–4 hours.
